class.name: action_trackers/ActionTrajectoryTracker
class.description: This is a controller which runs a trajectory action generated by planning server.

class.name: action_trackers/TakeOffTracker
class.description: Takeoff tracker that ramps thrust and switches to min-jerk.

class.name: action_trackers/LandTracker
class.description: Tracker which lands the robot regardless of bad mass / wind.
